mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, email, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `user` ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM `user` ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
